aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and some content related to services. However, there is a lack of customer reviews, limited content depth, and no active review management strategy.
quick_wins: Implement a strategy to generate and manage customer reviews on Google, Yelp, and Facebook.
Expand website content to include detailed service pages, location-specific information, and customer testimonials.
Optimize meta tags and headings with relevant keywords to improve search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has JSON-LD and Microdata schema types implemented.
gbp_analysis.summary: The website uses schema markup, but it may not be fully optimized for local search. The lack of Google Business Profile (GBP) integration is a critical issue.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) is found, which is essential for local search visibility.
Schema markup could be more detailed, including local business information, service details, and review data.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web. There is no evidence of a structured citation management strategy.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online platforms to ensure consistency.
Claim and verify the business on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Regularly monitor and manage citations to maintain accuracy and completeness.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema is not fully utilized; missing properties such as address, geo coordinates, and opening hours.
Review schema is not implemented to highlight customer reviews and ratings.
Service schema is not used to detail the specific HVAC services offered.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of GBP integration and customer reviews severely limits local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local HVAC services in Clearwater, Florida.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up and optimizing a Google Business Profile and actively managing customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content and earning backlinks from local directories and industry-related websites.
